sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43175" key="e(tero/metros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑτερό-μετρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43175.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of different metre</tr_>, both in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:p.74C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.74C.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
